channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: Following his phone call with US President Donald Trump, PM Keir Starmer said the UK and US are continuing to work together over events in the Middle East. #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Diplomacy #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: Following his phone call with US President Donald Trump, PM Keir Starmer said the UK and US are continuing to work together over events in the Middle East. #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Diplomacy #Iran #MiddleEast #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: Flames spread through a Victorian building next to Glasgow Central station after the fire began in a vape shop on Sunday. #Glasgow #Scotland #Rail #Trains #BBCNews
item.description: Flames spread through a Victorian building next to Glasgow Central station after the fire began in a vape shop on Sunday. #Glasgow #Scotland #Rail #Trains #BBCNews

item.title: The suspect, a woman in her 30s has been taken into custody and has not yet been publicly identified. #Rihanna #BeverlyHills #LosAngeles #USA #BBCNews
item.description: The suspect, a woman in her 30s has been taken into custody and has not yet been publicly identified. #Rihanna #BeverlyHills #LosAngeles #USA #BBCNews

item.title: All train services at Glasgow Central, Scotland's busiest station, have been cancelled after a fire which began at a vape shop caused a Victorian building to collapse. #Glasgow #Fire #Vape #Victorian #Train #GlasgowCentral #BBCNews
item.description: All train services at Glasgow Central, Scotland's busiest station, have been cancelled after a fire which began at a vape shop caused a Victorian building to collapse. #Glasgow #Fire #Vape #Victorian #Train #GlasgowCentral #BBCNews

item.title: President Volodymyr Zelensky has said Ukrainian drone experts will arrive in the Middle East this week to help Gulf states under attack from Iran. #Ukraine #Russia #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Gulf #BBCNews
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky has said Ukrainian drone experts will arrive in the Middle East this week to help Gulf states under attack from Iran. #Ukraine #Russia #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Gulf #BBCNews

item.title: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022. #Oil #MiddleEast #Iran #War #BBCNews
item.description: The benchmark oil price has passed $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022. #Oil #MiddleEast #Iran #War #BBCNews

item.title: The weekly Official UK Christian & Gospel Singles Chart has been launched to "highlight singles released by British artists" based on UK sales and streams. #GospelMusic #Christianity #UKMusic #Top10 #BBCNews
item.description: The weekly Official UK Christian & Gospel Singles Chart has been launched to "highlight singles released by British artists" based on UK sales and streams. #GospelMusic #Christianity #UKMusic #Top10 #BBCNews

item.title: The conflict in the Middle East in now in its tenth day after the US and Israel launched wide-ranging strikes on Iran, killing the country's supreme leader on 28 February. Iran has responded by launching attacks on Israel and US-allied states in the Gulf,
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East in now in its tenth day after the US and Israel launched wide-ranging strikes on Iran, killing the country's supreme leader on 28 February. Iran has responded by launching attacks on Israel and US-allied states in the Gulf,

item.title: On Saturday, US President Donald Trump said Iran was to blame for the strike on the school. Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the attack. Neither the US nor Israel has publicly accepted or denied responsibility. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: On Saturday, US President Donald Trump said Iran was to blame for the strike on the school. Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the attack. Neither the US nor Israel has publicly accepted or denied responsibility. #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei has been named Iran's new supreme leader and successor to his father, who was killed on the first day of the war with the US and Iran. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #US #BBCNews
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has been named Iran's new supreme leader and successor to his father, who was killed on the first day of the war with the US and Iran. #MojtabaKhamenei #Iran #US #BBCNews

item.title: Thousands of travellers waited in hours-long queues at US airports on Sunday. #Airport #Travel #SpringBreak #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Thousands of travellers waited in hours-long queues at US airports on Sunday. #Airport #Travel #SpringBreak #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The cost of petrol, flights, clothes and meals out are just some of the ways in which your finances could be affected by the US-Israeli war with Iran. #Iran #Economy #Oil #BBCNews
item.description: The cost of petrol, flights, clothes and meals out are just some of the ways in which your finances could be affected by the US-Israeli war with Iran. #Iran #Economy #Oil #BBCNews

item.title: Three branches of Al-Qard Al-Hassan had been hit by midday local time after Israel warned it was proactively targeting the institution. #Israel #Bank #Strike #Beiruit #Lebanon#MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Three branches of Al-Qard Al-Hassan had been hit by midday local time after Israel warned it was proactively targeting the institution. #Israel #Bank #Strike #Beiruit #Lebanon#MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: ScotRail said no services would operate in or out of the station on Tuesday and that disruption will continue for several days. #CentralStation #Glasgow #Scotland #Fire #UKNews #BBCNews
item.description: ScotRail said no services would operate in or out of the station on Tuesday and that disruption will continue for several days. #CentralStation #Glasgow #Scotland #Fire #UKNews #BBCNews

item.title: New York police say the suspects attempted to detonate two explosives outside Gracie Mansion, where Mayor Zohran Mamdani lives. Authorities found a third bomb in their car. #NewYorkCity #NewYork #Protest #Mamdani #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: New York police say the suspects attempted to detonate two explosives outside Gracie Mansion, where Mayor Zohran Mamdani lives. Authorities found a third bomb in their car. #NewYorkCity #NewYork #Protest #Mamdani #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Five members of the Iranian women's football team have taken refuge in a safe house in Australia following their elimination in the Asian Cup. #Iran #Australia #AsiaCup #GoldCoast #Football #BBCNews
item.description: Five members of the Iranian women's football team have taken refuge in a safe house in Australia following their elimination in the Asian Cup. #Iran #Australia #AsiaCup #GoldCoast #Football #BBCNews

item.title: The five women had been due to fly home, but supporters had raised fears for their safety after the team declined to sing the national anthem ahead of their match against South Korea in the Asian Cup last week. #Iran #Australia #Football #AsianCup #Asylum
item.description: The five women had been due to fly home, but supporters had raised fears for their safety after the team declined to sing the national anthem ahead of their match against South Korea in the Asian Cup last week. #Iran #Australia #Football #AsianCup #Asylum

item.title: Protesters in Australia surrounded the Iranian women’s football team bus after fears were raised for their safety when they declined to sing the national anthem. Five members of the team were granted humanitarian visas in the country. #Iran #Football #Pro
item.description: Protesters in Australia surrounded the Iranian women’s football team bus after fears were raised for their safety when they declined to sing the national anthem. Five members of the team were granted humanitarian visas in the country. #Iran #Football #Pro

item.title: Huntley, a former school caretaker who murdered two 10-year-old schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in Soham in 2002, died on Saturday following an attack in prison in February. #Soham #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Huntley, a former school caretaker who murdered two 10-year-old schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in Soham in 2002, died on Saturday following an attack in prison in February. #Soham #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump said operations in Iran are ahead of timeline, and said the country should put a 'peaceful' leader in charge. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #DonaldTrump#BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump said operations in Iran are ahead of timeline, and said the country should put a 'peaceful' leader in charge. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #DonaldTrump#BBCNews

item.title: People in Tehran have said they witnessed some of the 'hardest' bombardments of the US-Israeli war with Iran overnight on Monday. The number of people killed in Iran since the start of the war has reached 1,332 - including 206 women and children - accordi
item.description: People in Tehran have said they witnessed some of the 'hardest' bombardments of the US-Israeli war with Iran overnight on Monday. The number of people killed in Iran since the start of the war has reached 1,332 - including 206 women and children - accordi

item.title: The party of former Kathmandu mayor Balendra Shah is close to winning a supermajority in Nepal's parliament. #Nepal #Nepali #Kathmandu #BalenShah #KPOli #GenZProtests #NepalProtest #BBCNews
item.description: The party of former Kathmandu mayor Balendra Shah is close to winning a supermajority in Nepal's parliament. #Nepal #Nepali #Kathmandu #BalenShah #KPOli #GenZProtests #NepalProtest #BBCNews

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has said Iran will see attacks intensify on Tuesday as residents in Iran's capital Tehran tell the BBC it was hit hard overnight. #Iran #US #Israel #Tehran #MiddlEast #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has said Iran will see attacks intensify on Tuesday as residents in Iran's capital Tehran tell the BBC it was hit hard overnight. #Iran #US #Israel #Tehran #MiddlEast #BBCNews

item.title: Pete Hegseth echoed Trump's previous remarks, saying they are "crushing the enemy" in an unrelenting way. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #War #BBCNews
item.description: Pete Hegseth echoed Trump's previous remarks, saying they are "crushing the enemy" in an unrelenting way. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #War #BBCNews

item.title: Pete Hegseth was asked about what measures the Pentagon is taking to minimise civilian casualties in strikes inside Iran. It comes amid reports that a US missile hit a military base near a school. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #War #BBCNews
item.description: Pete Hegseth was asked about what measures the Pentagon is taking to minimise civilian casualties in strikes inside Iran. It comes amid reports that a US missile hit a military base near a school. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #War #BBCNews

item.title: One Piece actress Charithra Chandran speaks out over fan backlash. #OnePiece #CharithraChandran #Anime #BBCNews
item.description: One Piece actress Charithra Chandran speaks out over fan backlash. #OnePiece #CharithraChandran #Anime #BBCNews

item.title: Would you like to study the new V-levels? #Education #College #BTec #Students #BBCNews
item.description: Would you like to study the new V-levels? #Education #College #BTec #Students #BBCNews

item.title: Verified footage shows the window of a car being shattered by the shockwave from nearby strikes in the Iranian city of Karaj, as strikes continue on what's said to be the 'most intense' day of US war on Iran. #US #MiddleEast#Iran #BBCNews
item.description: Verified footage shows the window of a car being shattered by the shockwave from nearby strikes in the Iranian city of Karaj, as strikes continue on what's said to be the 'most intense' day of US war on Iran. #US #MiddleEast#Iran #BBCNews

item.title: The Rastriya Swatantra Party is on course to win a possible supermajority in an election held six months after deadly youth protests toppled Nepal's government. #Nepal #RSP #Kathmandu #BalenShah #KPOli #NepalProtest #BBCNews
item.description: The Rastriya Swatantra Party is on course to win a possible supermajority in an election held six months after deadly youth protests toppled Nepal's government. #Nepal #RSP #Kathmandu #BalenShah #KPOli #NepalProtest #BBCNews

item.title: Who’s ready for longer days and lighter evenings? 😩 #DaylightSavings #Daylight #Sunset #UKWeather #BBCNews
item.description: Who’s ready for longer days and lighter evenings? 😩 #DaylightSavings #Daylight #Sunset #UKWeather #BBCNews
